title: Lanthe Artifice
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Lanthe Artifice''' was a company that produced droids for the [[Tapani Noble Houses|Noble Houses]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Its sister company, [[Danthe Artifice, Ltd.]], and itself were once based on the planet [[Lanthe]] until the local [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] started nationalizing corporations.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
